'''Korev VII''' was an astronomical object that occupied the seventh [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="GG10" /> in the [[Korev system/Legends|Korev system]], a part of the [[Zaric sector/Legends|Zaric sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'' is set between the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which corresponds to some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Linis]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] issued from Korev VII a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Cherioer]].<ref name="GG10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Korev VII was introduced in the [[1994]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', which was written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="GG10" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Korev [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Korev VII, in grid square N-9.<ref name="TEA" />
